title: Cool Things and More
description: Minecraft sometimes feels a bit boring, so I put together a couple of mods to bring it to life.
body: ... is a modpack filled with furniture, new structures, upgraded structures, and more. It is a Vanilla+ style modpack perfect for your survival adventures. Make a comfy cabin in the woods, go exploe a dungeon or a village, fight the ender dragon in a whole new way. Everything in you world will be upgraded, terrain, structures, blocks, and models. This is the Minecraft experience you never knew existed.
